nasb.text: I also established My covenant with them, to give them the land of Canaan, the land in which they sojourned.

esv.text: I also established my covenant with them to give them the land of Canaan, the land in which they lived as sojourners.

cnv.text: 我不但與他們確立了我的約，要把迦南地，就是他們作客寄居之地賜給他們；

ccb.text: 我向他们坚守所立的约，要把他们寄居的迦南赐给他们。
